flags.label: Public bachelor's-predominant peer
flags.summary: 10-year earnings at Georgia Institute of Technology-Main Campus are 114% above the public bachelor's-predominant peer median ($102.8k vs $48.1k).

flags.label: 3-year cohort default rate
flags.summary: 3-year cohort default rate at Georgia Institute of Technology-Main Campus fell 100% between 2021 and 2024 (0.4% → 0.0%).

flags.label: 100%-time completion
flags.summary: 100%-time completion at Georgia Institute of Technology-Main Campus rose 25% between 2021 and 2024 (51.0% → 63.6%).

flags.label: Undergraduate enrollment
flags.summary: Undergraduate enrollment at Georgia Institute of Technology-Main Campus rose 13% between 2021 and 2024 (16.6k → 18.8k).
